_comment: Priority 3.2 Advanced Dosha rules and lookup tables. Evaluated by advancedDoshaRuleEvaluator.js using the SAME Rule Engine as rules/doshas.json, extended (not replaced) with anyOf/houseDistanceFromIn/etc. Kept separate from doshas.json so Priority 2/3.1's original dosha rule set stays byte-for-byte untouched. House numbers are Lagna-relative except where explicitly 'from Moon'.
_priority6ScopeNote: V2.0 Phase 6 requested Pitru Dosha, Guru Chandal Dosha, Kemadruma Dosha, Grahan Dosha, and Shrapit Dosha, which were ALREADY implemented here in Priority 3.2 (rules: pitruDosha, guruChandalYoga, grahanYogaSun, grahanYogaMoon, shrapitYoga, kemadrumaYoga) and are re-verified, unchanged, in Phase 6 — see the Verification Report. Nadi Dosha is intentionally NOT added as a rule: it is classically a horoscope-MATCHING (Kundli Milan) dosha, determined by comparing the Nadi of TWO people's Nakshatras — it has no valid single-birth-chart definition, and this application does not have a matchmaking/synastry feature. Adding a single-chart 'Nadi Dosha' rule would be astrologically incorrect, so it is out of scope per this phase's 'do not implement features outside scope' instruction and is left for a future dedicated Kundli-Matching phase.

rules.name: Pitru Dosha
rules.detailTemplate: Sun is afflicted by conjunction with a shadow planet, or Rahu/Ketu occupies the 9th house, a configuration traditionally associated with Pitru Dosha (ancestral karmic debt).

rules.name: Guru Chandal Yoga
rules.detailTemplate: Jupiter conjoins Rahu in house {Jupiter_house}, a configuration traditionally associated with Guru Chandal Yoga (wisdom clouded by restlessness or unconventional thinking).

rules.name: Grahan Yoga (Surya Grahan)
rules.detailTemplate: Sun conjoins a shadow planet (Rahu/Ketu) in house {Sun_house}, a configuration traditionally associated with Grahan (eclipse) Yoga.

rules.name: Grahan Yoga (Chandra Grahan)
rules.detailTemplate: Moon conjoins a shadow planet (Rahu/Ketu) in house {Moon_house}, a configuration traditionally associated with Grahan (eclipse) Yoga.

rules.name: Shrapit Yoga
rules.detailTemplate: Saturn conjoins Rahu in house {Saturn_house}, a configuration traditionally associated with Shrapit Yoga (a sense of being 'cursed' or delayed until karmic lessons are resolved).

rules.name: Kemadruma Yoga
rules.detailTemplate: No planet (other than the Sun/Rahu/Ketu) occupies the houses immediately before or after the Moon (2nd/12th from Moon), a configuration traditionally associated with Kemadruma Yoga (a sense of isolation needing conscious effort to overcome).
